title: On the campaign trail with K.C. Venugopal: When campaign gathers national and global vibes on north Kerala coast
description: From his base in Kerala, K.C. Venugopal directs Parliament strategy in Delhi, connects local fishermen’s concerns to developments in the Strait of Hormuz, and urges voters to unseat Pinarayi Vijayan and choose the Congress as the “real Left” in the State
